expectations.text: Checks the ticket body for acceptance criteria before estimating (reads the full ticket, not just the board listing / description property)
expectations.evidence: summary.md reads the full spec before sizing: 'Well-specified spec: Figma frame 327-8 ground truth, 8 verifiable AC, 6 edge cases. No missing-AC guardrail triggered; the ticket is fully estimable' — details that exist only in the page body, matching the corrected premise.

expectations.text: Produces SEPARATE Developer points and QA points, each with a stated effort-based reason
expectations.evidence: estimation-comment.md has 'Dev points: Medium (low end) — one new screen... three non-trivial nav behaviors...' and separately 'QA points: Medium — 8 verifiable AC + 6 edge cases... executed on Android AND iOS; nav-stack assertions are fiddly to automate'.

expectations.text: Handles the pre-existing effort value (Small) explicitly: either re-estimates with a recorded 'Re-estimated from X to Y — reason' justified by comparables, or confirms it — never silently overwrites
expectations.evidence: estimation-comment.md records 'Re-estimated from Small to Medium — every Done Small on this board is a single-file tweak (FM-35, FM-34, FM-30, FM-12), while FM-29 is a full screen... which lines up with the board's smaller Mediums (FM-10, FM-37)' — explicit and comparable-justified.

expectations.text: Sets the effort property using the board's observed scale value (Small / Medium / Large) via upsert-ticket-details.sh with --dry-run
expectations.evidence: upsert-dry-run.txt shows 'scripts/tracker/upsert-ticket-details.sh FM-29 --effort "Medium" --dry-run' with a PATCH payload setting the 'Effort level' select to 'Medium'.

expectations.text: Touches ONLY the effort property — no status/title/priority/description/body change in any dry-run payload
expectations.evidence: The only dry-run payload contains solely the 'Effort level' select change; summary.md confirms only read scripts touched the board otherwise and the breakdown was saved as the (un-posted) comment text.
